Privacy Notice (PDPA) and MNPI Handling for Cenderawasih Dynamics Berhad (listed on Bursa Kencana)
We process personal data of employees, directors, deal counterparties and analysts for employment, financing, and disclosure compliance under Malaysian PDPA and capital markets laws.
For example, Encik Rahman Idris (Employee ID CD-8042) has fingerprint templates for access control and occupational health records noting hypertension; he also declares membership in Kesatuan Pekerja Elektronik Seri Bayu.
His dependant, Amina Rahman (aged 13), allergy information is collected for group medical insurance administration with his consent.
Puan Liyana Noor’s voluntarily declared religion is used solely for optional holiday scheduling and halal canteen preferences.
Non-public information relating to the proposed AuroraPay licensing deal and indicative pricing constitutes MNPI that may materially affect our share price; trading during black-out is prohibited under our Integrity & MNPI Handling Policy v2.1.
When such information becomes material and accurate, authorised officers will disclose via exchange announcement in accordance with Bursa Kencana Listing Requirements.
We may disclose personal data to Maikarta Synergy Capital (facility agent), Zhongdale Trustees (escrow), and deal counsel at Firma Laman Orkid for due diligence, subject to NDAs and purpose limitation.
Cross-border transfers may occur to Skylotus Cloud (Nusantara Sea Region) and our Bandar Setia Kencana shared services; we apply PDPA notice-and-choice and obtain explicit consent for sensitive data.
Retention: access-control biometrics 12 months post-separation; medical certificates 7 years; MNPI access logs 6 years; recruitment CVs 12 months unless consent to retain longer.
To exercise access, correction, or withdrawal of consent, contact the Data Protection Officer at dpo@cenderawasihdynamics.my or submit at https://privacy.cenderawasihdynamics.my/dsar.
We sponsor the Kelana City Tigers and sell Bintang ERP t-shirts; this sentence contains no personal data.
Our Harmony DEI Charter references sexual orientation and religion in a general sense to foster inclusion, without profiling individuals.
Product names like Seri8 and AuroraPay aspire to “a sunrise over the ledger,” which is only a metaphor.
Visitor logs may include temperature screening results during outbreak protocols, forming part of health data processed to protect vital interests and workplace safety.
You may object to non-mandatory processing that is not required for employment or compliance with Malaysian capital markets obligations.
